working_on: Routine task P5-06: Aesthetics seed — ninth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; single-task (not pre-split) per phase_5.md T1-B with depends_on [P5-01a] satisfied since S-0050. Intended deliverable: 0110_seed_aesthetics_part1.sql with aesthetics core concepts (nature of art; aesthetic experience and properties; representation; expression theory; formalism; aesthetic value; institutional theory per Dickie 1974; historical theory per Levinson 1979; aesthetic judgment per Kant 1790; taste; aesthetic disinterest; the sublime; pictorial representation per Goodman 1968; ontology of art works; performances and types; fictional truth; metaphor; criticism and interpretation; intentionalism vs anti-intentionalism). Within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges only; cross-domain bridges to philosophy of mind (perception/imagination), philosophy of language (fictional reference, metaphor), and ethics (aesthetic vs ethical evaluation) deferred to P5-11. **Boot diagnostics established the documented apply path is denied for routine sessions** — see Issues #18 (routine-mode DB-apply path regression) and #19 (check_target.py adr_status duplicate-id). S-0063 will eager-claim the slot, mark P5-06 blocked: decision-required, write HANDOFF, and run shutdown without authoring the migration. Probe-fire shape: documents the blocker via Issue #18 + HANDOFF; consumes one routine slot of the 18 max_sessions budget.
declared_scope: Per phase_5.md T2-D: scope_lock for P5-06 is product/seed-graph/migrations/0110_*.sql through 0119_*.sql + PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md + ROUTING.md. **S-0063 will not touch any deliverable path** under the apply-path infrastructure blocker (Issues #18, #19).
